Join us on Warpcast

Join our growing community on Warpcast to earn community points, ham allocations, and connect with others.

DASHBOARD

Empowering social connections with fun experiences built on decentralized systems.

Ham Tips

Join the shift to social tipping with Ham. Reward quality content on Warpcast, the decentralized social media app, by dropping the Ham emoji as a comment on posts that you like. This costs nothing to you, but rewards the receiver in a big way!

Ham tips are backed by the social token $TN100x and have real value for those that receive them.

You can earn an allocation of Ham tips by posting engaging content in Ham's channel on Warpcast.

Microtransactions have been talked about for years, and now there's a fun and engaging way that makes it easy to send small amounts of currency to content creators and friends!

Floaties are emojis that are backed by REAL CURRENCY and can be gifted as comments on social media posts. The receiver of the Floaty is paid within minutes.

Floaties are currently only supported on Warpcast, but we are going to bring Floaties to the masses - all supported by crypto and blockchain!

Floaties

$TN100x aka "The Next 100x Memecoin on Base". This is the coin that powers the HAM ecosystem. It's more than a memecoin, it's a social token, and a driving force behind everything Ham.

65% community, 20% LP, 15% ecosystem that includes 5% to the team vested over two years.

You can buy TN100x on platforms like Aerodrome, earn through our liquidity mining program, airdrops, and Ham tips.

The Based LP

The Based LP is a trustless, well-funded, and slightly overweight NFT character. All funds from the mint went to $TN100x and NFT liquidity. Holders earn fees from Sudoswap secondary sales and each NFT is backed by $TN100x. NFTs can be burnt for 60% of their $TN100x backing the other 40% goes to backing the rest of the NFTs. The longer you hold the more you get.
